factors.summary: Demand is accelerating, supported by strong organic and acquisition-driven revenue growth.

evidence.text: Revenue generated for 2017 was $4,707 million, an increase of $936 million, or 24.8%, compared to $3,771 million in 2016. Orders received during 2017 increased by $1,044 million, or 27.3%, to $4,868 million.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Demand is accelerating with strong revenue and order growth.

factors.summary: Order backlog is growing, with a 17% increase year-over-year.

evidence.text: Total backlog was $1,513 million at December 31, 2017 and $1,292 million at December 31, 2016, an increase of 17%. The December 31, 2016 backlog balance has been revised to include contractual agreements that Sensus has with customers.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: 17% year-over-year increase in backlog indicates strong demand.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is accelerating, contributing $122 million to total revenue growth in 2017.

evidence.text: Strong organic growth of $122 million during the year, driven primarily by North America as well as strength in the emerging markets, particularly in China and India.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Strong organic growth of $122 million in 2017.

factors.summary: Unit volumes or transaction counts are growing, particularly in the Applied Water segment.

evidence.text: Applied Water segment orders increased by $71 million, or 5.1%, to $1,476 million. The order increase was primarily due to organic order growth of $79 million, or 5.6%, driven by strength in the emerging markets and strong commercial building and industrial performance in North America.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Applied Water segment shows 5.1% order growth.

factors.summary: End markets in North America, emerging markets (China, India), and Europe are growing fastest.

evidence.text: Organic growth for the year was driven by strength in North America as well as strength in the emerging markets, particularly in China and India. Additionally, to a lesser extent, Europe contributed to this organic growth despite ongoing weakness in the United Kingdom during the year.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Strong growth in North America, China, India, and Europe.

factors.summary: Gross margins are expanding due to cost reductions and procurement initiatives.

evidence.text: Gross margins as a percentage of consolidated revenue increased to 39.3% in 2017 from 38.7% in 2016. The gross margin increase was primarily due to the benefits realized from cost reductions from global procurement and continuous improvement initiatives.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Gross margins expanded by 0.6% due to cost reductions.

factors.summary: Restructuring actions are delivering measurable savings, with annual net savings expected to begin in 2018.

evidence.text: The charges included the reduction of headcount and consolidation of facilities within our Applied Water and Water Infrastructure segments, as well as headcount reductions within our Measurement & Control Solutions segment. As a result of these actions initiated in 2017, we achieved savings of approximately $4 million in 2017 and estimate annual future net savings beginning in 2018 of approximately $9 million.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Restructuring actions delivered $4 million savings in 2017 with expected $9 million annual savings.

factors.summary: Operational efficiency is improving through global procurement and productivity initiatives.

evidence.text: The gross margin increase was primarily due to the benefits realized from cost reductions from global procurement and continuous improvement initiatives, as well as a decrease in the inventory step-up charge for Sensus in 2017.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Operational efficiency improvements through procurement and initiatives.

factors.summary: Acquisitions are creating value, with the Sensus acquisition contributing significantly to revenue growth.

evidence.text: The revenue increase for the year was almost entirely from $790 million of revenue related to acquisitions that we did not have in the prior year. Most of the additional revenue contributed by the Sensus business was generated in the United States with additional revenue coming primarily from western Europe and China.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The factor shows significant revenue growth due to successful acquisitions, particularly Sensus, contributing positively to the company's performance.

factors.summary: Foreign exchange movements are having a favorable impact on revenue and orders.

evidence.text: Revenue benefited from $16 million of foreign currency translation for the year and included organic growth of $56 million, or 2.9%. Orders received during 2017 increased by $1,044 million, or 27.3%, to $4,868 million (26.4% increase on a constant currency basis).

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Foreign exchange movements have favorably impacted revenue and orders, indicating a positive macroeconomic trend for the company.
